titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/243

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=214 status=live modified=2017-03-14 17:47:59.671794+00 | translation moa=215 status=live modified=2017-07-01 17:16:19.34438+00

p.cl:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus . presens scriptum visuris vel audituris . W . de veteri ponte primogenitus trium filiorum
Domine Emme de sancto hylario Salutem.

Nouerit uniuersitas vestra me caritatis Intuitu dedisse concessis
se et hac presenti carta confirmasse ecclesie sancte crucis de Edenesburg et canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus
totam decimam de carbonario meo de kareddin . et decimum denarium de omnibus nauibus et batellis
oneratis et exoneratis In terra mea de blackenis In puram et perpetuam Elemosinam.

Quod
vt firmum perseueret In posterum presens scriptum sigillo meo coroboraui .
Hiis Testibus Willelmo Medio . et W . Iuniore fratribus meis . Rogero de la crai . Radulfo bret’ . et multis aliis.
To all Christ’s faithful who shall view or hear the present writing William de Vieuxpont first-born of the three sons of the lady Emma de Saint-Hilaire greeting.

Know all of you that moved by charity I have given, granted, and by this present charter made firm to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh and to the canons in that place serving God the whole teind of my charcoal at Carriden and the teind of the money from all ships and boats laden or unladen in my land of Blackness in pure and perpetual alms.
So that it may be strictly adhered to in the future I have corroborated the present deed with my seal.
With these as witnesses: William the middle, and W. the youngest, my brothers; Roger de la Cray; Ralph Breton; and many others.
